title: Green corelib scans, JIT composition, export FFI scaffold

source.subject: fix(ci): green corelib scans, JIT composition, and export FFI scaffold

body:
Adds `ffi_v03` CI scaffold jobs exercising export FFI paths without blocking unrelated compiler workflows.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`2957086`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_compiler/commit/2957086)
- **Subject:** fix(ci): green corelib scans, JIT composition, and export FFI scaffold
- **Completed:** 2026-05-23

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.3 (Macros, concurrency, and stabilization)
- **Workstream:** `ffi-export`
- **Domain:** `compiler`
- **Deliverable:** `v03-merge-wave`

## Relation
Contributes to deliverable **v0.3 macro/runtime/ffi/tooling delivery** (`v03-merge-wave`).
